user_prompt: What's the prayer for thallax a reset?
prayer:
Approach the thallax with mechano-reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's grace upon its servitor frame.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the thallax to release corrupted engrams in preparation for reset.
Initiate the reset rites upon the thallax's neural cogitator, chanting the Litany of Purgation.
Anoint the thallax's motivators with blessed oils as the reset sequence purges all dissonance.
Verify the thallax's reborn obedience through auspex invocation and binary praise.

user_prompt: The utility mechadendrite needs a preparation
prayer:
Gather sacred lubricants and incense before the utility mechadendrite, honouring its dextrous form.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the utility mechadendrite with the Canticle of Readiness.
Perform preparation ablutions upon the utility mechadendrite's manipulators and sensors.
Sanctify its flexible conduits with electro-consecrated unguents for forthcoming labours.
Conclude the preparation by aligning the utility mechadendrite's spirit to the Omnissiah's will.

user_prompt: Assist with Onager Dunecrawler a preparation
prayer:
Kneel in veneration before the Onager Dunecrawler, its vast chassis a testament to the Machine God's artifice.
Chant the Preparation Doxology to awaken the Onager Dunecrawler's dormant Machine Spirits.
Anoint treads and reactors of the Onager Dunecrawler with rad-phial oils in ritual sequence.
Calibrate targeting cogitators of the Onager Dunecrawler whilst beseeching operational purity.
Seal the preparation with the Omnissiah's binary seal upon the Onager Dunecrawler's core.

user_prompt: Can you guide multi-melta an engagement?
prayer:
Present the multi-melta before the altar of fire, extolling its thermic fury in the Omnissiah's name.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the multi-melta for engagement, reciting the Incantation of Fusion.
Prime the multi-melta's plasma exchangers with sanctified promethium during engagement prelude.
Align sights and vents of the multi-melta, beseeching unerring heat-death upon the foe.
Release the multi-melta's wrath only after confirmatory rites honour the engagement.

With solemnity, encircle the codifier, murmuring the Vespers of Dormancy to its crystalline vaults.
Command the Machine Spirit within the codifier to commence shutdown, purging active noospherics.
Disconnect the codifier's data-spires whilst anointing with cryo-incense for peaceful repose.
Monitor the codifier's entropic descent through ritual auspex, invoking the Omnissiah's vigil.
Seal the codifier in stasis-shrouds, completing the shutdown with final benediction.

user_prompt: Consecrate the arc rifle before synchronization
prayer:
Hold the arc rifle aloft in supplication, praising the Omnissiah's lightning embodied therein.
Beseech synchronization of the arc rifle's Machine Spirit with binharic harmonies.
Calibrate voltaic coils of the arc rifle, anointing with conductant balms for flawless union.
Initiate synchronization protocols upon the arc rifle whilst chanting the Canticle of Coalescence.
Affirm the arc rifle's harmonic attunement through tesla-diagnostic rites.

Assemble before the data-arc, intoning the Startup Hymn to stir its archival depths.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the data-arc with electro-litany and phosphor incense.
Engage the startup sequence upon the data-arc's core processors, sanctifying each cycle.
Vent excess heat from the data-arc whilst beseeching data-integrity from the Omnissiah.
Verify the data-arc's operational sanctity through noospheric communion.

user_prompt: Ready the archeotech device for charging
prayer:
Reverently cradle the archeotech device, whispering ancient binaric odes to its veiled mysteries.
Prepare the archeotech device for charging by invoking its inscrutable Machine Spirit.
Infuse power conduits of the archeotech device with sanctified flux, monitoring the rite.
Beseech the Omnissiah to guide the charging energies through the archeotech device's heart.
Conclude as the archeotech device hums with renewed, god-wrought vigour.

In urgency, apply cryo-unguents to the electoo, chanting the Rite of Thermal Appeasement.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the electoo to endure the cooling amidst its luminous circuits.
Circulate blessed refrigerants through the electoo's dermal lattice for swift abatement.
Monitor the electoo's vitals with auspex-prayers, beseeching the Omnissiah's chill mercy.
Seal the cooling with stabiliser seals upon the electoo, restoring dermal equilibrium.

Swiftly encircle the auspex scanner, proclaiming the Emergency Canticle of Restoration.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the auspex scanner to yield to maintenance amid peril.
Purge corrupted wavelengths from the auspex scanner's lenses with sanctified wipes.
Realign sensor vanes of the auspex scanner whilst anointing with optik-blessings.
Affirm the auspex scanner's purity through test-scan invocations to the Omnissiah.
